violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee put on gloves without washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Cooked corned beef and taco meat found not date marked. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when held for more than 24 hours.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor under equipment was found dirty. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean. Wall behind the pizza prep area was also found dirty. Walls should be maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Door for the Coke reach-in cooler was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system filters were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor under and behind the grill and fryers was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
